major_mechanics.name: Bridge Defense
major_mechanics.when: Occurs throughout the event as Glenna moves across the bridge.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Warg spawns, snipers on ledges, and Glenna calling for help.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Stay near Glenna, kill incoming enemies quickly, and prevent her from being overwhelmed.
major_mechanics.failure: If Glenna is downed or killed, the event fails.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players running too far ahead; ignoring snipers; leaving Glenna unprotected.

major_mechanics.name: Tower Captures
major_mechanics.when: Triggered when players reach each tower along the path.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A champion enemy guarding the tower and Glenna stopping at the base.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Split into assigned groups, kill the champion, and capture the tower to progress.
major_mechanics.failure: If towers are not captured, Glenna cannot proceed and the event stalls.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Groups not splitting correctly; failing to CC champions; leaving towers uncleared.

minor_mechanics.name: Warg Ambushes
minor_mechanics.summary: Wargs periodically attack Glenna and must be killed quickly.

major_mechanics.name: Core Push
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each burn phase transition when the core becomes active.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A glowing orb (the core) appears and begins moving slowly.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Push the core into Keep Construct by attacking it while avoiding stray hits that knock it off course.
major_mechanics.failure: If the core is not pushed in time, the phase resets and the fight is prolonged.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players hitting the core from the wrong angle; pushing too early; failing to stack for control.

major_mechanics.name: Orb Collection
major_mechanics.when: Happens during the split phases when Keep Construct becomes invulnerable.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Small orbs spawning around the arena with glowing trails.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Collect orbs and deliver them to the center to charge the core.
major_mechanics.failure: Insufficient orbs collected results in a weak burn phase or phase failure.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players collecting orbs inefficiently; missing orbs; not coordinating routes.

major_mechanics.name: Phantasmal Blades
major_mechanics.when: Occurs regularly throughout the fight, especially during burn phases.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Blades materializing around the arena and sweeping in straight lines.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Dodge or sidestep the blades while maintaining DPS.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit by multiple blades can down or kill players.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players tunneling on DPS; standing in predictable blade paths.

major_mechanics.name: Button Phases
major_mechanics.when: Triggered at the start of each platform phase and during transitions.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Buttons glowing on platforms and Xera becoming invulnerable.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Assign players to stand on buttons simultaneously to progress the encounter.
major_mechanics.failure: If buttons are not activated in time, the phase stalls and adds overwhelm the group.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing on the wrong button; stepping off too early; poor coordination.

major_mechanics.name: Platform Breaks
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during the final phase and periodically during transitions.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Platforms glowing red and beginning to crumble.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move quickly to intact platforms before the current one collapses.
major_mechanics.failure: Falling results in instant death and can cause a wipe if too many players fall.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players waiting too long; misjudging jump distances; not following the group.

major_mechanics.name: Mirror Images
major_mechanics.when: Spawn during each split phase and periodically during the fight.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Illusions of Xera appearing around the arena.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Kill mirror images quickly to reduce pressure and prevent arena clutter.
major_mechanics.failure: Too many illusions overwhelm the group with damage and mechanics.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players ignoring illusions; splitting damage inefficiently.

minor_mechanics.name: Bloodstone Shards
minor_mechanics.summary: Shards fall from above and must be avoided.
